positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial wreath formed by bioluminescent night-blooming flowers and glowing ethereal vines. The composition features strong contrasting silhouettes of lunar crescents and stylized woodland animals (deer, foxes) integrated seamlessly into the botanical pattern. Use a deep indigo and midnight blue color palette contrasted with neon cyan, electric lavender, and glowing gold accents. The style should be detailed, illustrative, and highly graphic, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets modern botanical ink drawings, designed for perfect repetition and central placement on fabric. Flat graphic design, clean lines, high contrast, symmetrical composition, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, sketch, low detail, artifacts, noise, watermark, text, signature, logo, dirty, gradient, oversaturated, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy
